name: Steak & Green Peppers
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Round Steak, Cut 1/2-inch Thick Into Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the steak into 1/2-inch strips.
2. Combine the soy sauce, beef bouillon, mashed garlic and ginger in a bowl.
3. Pour this marinade over the steak strips and cover. Marinate, refrigerated, at least 2 hours (up to 12 hours).
4. Drain the meat and discard the garlic.
5. Dry the meat strips on towel.
6. Brown the meat in the vegetable oil in a large skillet.
7. Heat the reserved marinade in a separate pan.
8. Add the boiling water to the reserved marinade.
9. Cover and simmer about 45 minutes.
10. Add the green bell pepper strips and sliced water chestnuts.
11. Simmer until the meat is tender.
12. Mix the cornstarch with the second measure of water until smooth.
13. Gradually stir this mixture into the meat mixture.
14. Continue stirring until the gravy thickens.
15. Serve over boiled white rice.
